files.purpose: Main HTML file, entry point for the React application, contains the root element.
Renders the React application into the DOM, imports App.jsx and global styles.
Main application component, orchestrates the Todo app's layout and state.
Global CSS file, imports Tailwind CSS base, components, and utilities.
Component for adding new todo tasks, includes an input field and an add button.
Component for displaying the list of todo tasks, maps over tasks and renders TodoItem components.
Component for an individual todo task, displays task text, complete checkbox, and delete button.
Custom React hook for managing todo state (add, complete, delete) and persistence.
Defines project metadata, scripts, and dependencies.
Tailwind CSS configuration file, for customizing themes, plugins, and purging.
PostCSS configuration, typically used by Tailwind CSS for processing CSS.
Specifies intentionally untracked files to ignore.
